description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure wearing a tall, elaborate headdress, suggestive of ancient Egyptian iconography. The figure is positioned on a high-backed throne, with one arm resting on the armrest and the other holding a smaller, child-like figure on its lap. The surface of the sculpture is dark and appears to be made of stone, with subtle engravings and a matte finish. The back of the throne features vertical ridges and possible inscriptions or decorative motifs. The overall form is blocky and monumental, with a strong sense of symmetry and authority. The base is rectangular and flat, providing stability and a clear boundary between the sculpture and the ground.
description: A dark stone sculpture of a seated figure with a tall headdress, holding a smaller figure on its lap, set on a high-backed throne with engraved details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the seated figure, the tall headdress, and the high-backed throne with engraved details.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the face, headdress, and the smaller figure seated on the lap of the main figure.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the arm position and the throne's side engravings, with both figures clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view focusing on the back of the throne, showing vertical ridges and possible inscriptions.
attribute_subject_matter: seated human figure with child, inspired by ancient Egyptian motifs
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
